iPhone・Androidの容量不足を解消！ストレージを空ける5つの方法と写真: Solve iPhone/Android Storage Shortage! 5 Ways to Free Up Space and Back Up Photos
スマホの「ストレージの空き容量がありません」という警告に悩んでいませんか？本記事: Are you troubled by the "Storage is full" warning on your smartphone? In this article, we explain 5 ways to fundamentally solve storage shortage on iPhone and Android devices, and how to safely back up and save your precious photos and videos.
スマホ 容量不足, iPhone ストレージ 増やす, Android 容量 空: smartphone storage full, increase iPhone storage, clear Android space, photo backup, clear cache
スマートフォンを使っていて、「ストレージの空き容量がありません」「システムメモリ: Have you ever seen warning screens like "Out of storage space" or "System memory is running low" while using your smartphone? If you take many photos and videos or keep installing convenient apps, your phone's capacity will be full in no time.
容量不足のままスマホを使い続けると、新しい写真が保存できなくなるだけでなく、アプ: If you continue to use your smartphone with insufficient storage, not only will you be unable to save new photos, but apps will run slower, and in the worst case, your phone might suddenly force quit and fail to start (boot loop issues). In this article, we explain 5 concrete steps to free up storage on both iPhone and Android, and backup methods to prevent losing precious data.
ステップ1：現在のストレージ使用状況を正確に把握する: Step 1: Check Current Storage Usage Accurately
まずは、何がスマホの容量を圧迫しているのかを確認しましょう。原因を知らずに対策を: First, let's check what is taking up your phone's space. Taking action without knowing the cause may be ineffective.
「設定」アプリ ＞「一般」 ＞「iPhoneストレージ」の順にタップします。グラ: Tap "Settings" > "General" > "iPhone Storage". A graph will show the breakdown of photos, apps, system, etc., and you can check which apps consume the most storage in a list.
「設定」アプリ ＞「ストレージ」（または「デバイスケア」 ＞「ストレージ」）をタ: Tap "Settings" > "Storage" (or "Device Care" > "Storage"). The capacity will be shown by category such as images, videos, system, and apps.
ここで数GB以上の大容量を占めているアプリやファイル形式があれば、それが今回の整: If there are apps or file formats occupying a large capacity of several GBs or more, they will be the highest priority target for this cleanup.
ステップ2：不要なアプリの削除と「一時キャッシュ」のクリーンアップ: Step 2: Delete Unused Apps and Clean Up "Temporary Cache"
使っていないアプリはアンインストールするのが基本ですが、日常的に使うアプリでも「: While uninstalling unused apps is the basic rule, there are many cases where temporary data called "cache" builds up even in apps you use daily.
LINEやSNSアプリのキャッシュ削除：: Delete cache in LINE and SNS apps:
特にLINEは、トーク内で送受信した写真や動画のキャッシュが数GBから数十GBに: In LINE, the cache of photos and videos sent and received in chats can swell to several GBs or tens of GBs. You can safely delete expired cache data from "Settings" > "Photos & Videos" > "Delete Data" in the LINE app.
Safari（iPhone）は「設定」＞「Safari」＞「履歴とWebサイトデ: You can free up hundreds of MBs to several GBs of space by deleting cache: for Safari (iPhone), go to "Settings" > "Safari" > "Clear History and Website Data"; for Chrome (Android/PC), select "Clear browsing data" in the app settings.
iPhoneには「非使用のAppを取り除く」という機能があります。これを使うと、: iPhone has a feature called "Offload Unused Apps". This allows you to delete only the app itself while keeping its data and settings to save storage.
ステップ3：写真や動画の「ゴミ箱」を完全に空にする: Step 3: Empty the "Trash" of Photos and Videos Completely
不要な写真や動画を「削除」しただけでは、実はストレージは空きません。多くのスマホ: Simply "deleting" unwanted photos and videos actually doesn't free up storage. This is because on many smartphones, deleted files are temporarily moved to a folder like "Trash" or "Recently Deleted" and kept for 30 days.
今すぐ容量を増やしたい場合は、写真アプリを開き、: If you want to free up space immediately, open the photos app and:
「最近削除した項目」（iPhone）または「ゴミ箱」（Android）のフォルダ: Open the "Recently Deleted" (iPhone) or "Trash" (Android) folder and execute "Delete All"
してください。これにより、選択したデータが端末から完全に消去され、即座に空き容量: Doing so will completely erase the selected data from the device and immediately create free space.
ステップ4：動画撮影の設定を見直す（予防策）: Step 4: Review Video Recording Settings (Preventive Measure)
写真に比べて、動画（ムービー）は圧倒的にファイルサイズが大きくなります。特に最近: Compared to photos, videos have an overwhelmingly larger file size. Especially on recent smartphones, shooting for just a few minutes in high-quality settings like "4K / 60fps" can easily consume several GBs of space.
日常の記録であれば、「1080p HD / 30fps」などの標準的な画質に設定: For daily recording, we recommend lowering the settings to a standard quality like "1080p HD / 30fps". You can change the quality from "Settings" > "Camera" > "Record Video" on iPhone, or from the camera app settings on Android. This alone can significantly slow down storage consumption.
ステップ5：クラウドストレージやPCへ写真を退避・バックアップする: Step 5: Move/Back Up Photos to Cloud Storage or PC
端末のデータを消したくないけれど容量を空けたい場合は、外部にデータを移動（退避）: If you do not want to delete data from the device but want to free up space, you need to move (offload) the data externally.
iCloud（Apple）やGoogleフォト、OneDriveなどを利用し、写: Use services like iCloud (Apple), Google Photos, or OneDrive to back up photos to the cloud automatically. After backup is complete, you can dramatically reduce the phone's storage usage by deleting original photos from the device (or changing them to an optimized smaller size).
PCを持っているなら、定期的にケーブルやWi-Fi経由でスマホのデータをPCのハ: If you have a PC, regularly move your smartphone data to the PC's hard drive or an external SSD via cable or Wi-Fi.
スマホからPCへ、ケーブルなしで素早く写真を送るなら「FS!QR」: Use "FS!QR" to Send Photos Quickly from Smartphone to PC Without Cables
「クラウドストレージは月額料金がかかるし、PCに繋ぐケーブルを探すのも面倒……」: When "cloud storage has monthly fees and finding a cable to connect to a PC is annoying...", a free file-sharing service that requires no registration is extremely convenient.
スマホのブラウザからFS!QRにアクセスし、バックアップしたい写真や動画を選択し: Open FS!QR in your smartphone browser, select the photos or videos you want to back up, and upload them. A download QR code and share link will appear. Then scan the QR code with the PC camera, or open the share link in the PC browser and enter the 6-digit password if needed to save the data to the PC. No account registration or app installation is required, so you can immediately move data to your PC when phone storage is running low and free up the device. Use it for everyday storage management.
